htmlBody.description: The HTML body of the email notification for the issue.

restrict.description: Restricts the notifications to users with the specified permissions.

subject.description: The subject of the email notification for the issue. If this is not specified, then the subject is set to the issue key and summary.

textBody.description: The plain text body of the email notification for the issue.

to.description: The recipients of the email notification for the issue.
